query:
WITH to_delete AS (
            SELECT id FROM v2_job_queue
                JOIN v2_job j USING (id)
            WHERE trigger_kind = 'schedule'
                AND trigger = $1
                AND j.workspace_id = $2
                AND flow_step_id IS NULL
                AND running = false
            FOR UPDATE
        )
        DELETE FROM v2_job_queue
        WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM to_delete)
        RETURNING id
